# Third-Party Licenses

This challenge includes source derived from the JPEG Systems JUMBF Reference Implementation 2:

https://gitlab.com/wg1/jpeg-systems/reference-software/jumbf-reference-implementation-2

The upstream project is licensed under the BSD 3-Clause "New" or "Revised" License. The license text is included at `dbench_jumbf/LICENSE.txt`.

Local changes: this challenge bundles a reduced subset of the upstream library. Unused typed box classes and encoder/serialization helpers were omitted, and small compatibility edits were made for the validator service.

This notice is attribution only and does not imply endorsement by the upstream copyright holder or contributors.
